channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Appeals court blocks California's No Vigilantes law forcing ICE to display names while on duty
item.description: A federal appeals court ruled against California Gov. Gavin Newsom on Wednesday, putting on hold his state law that tried to force federal immigration...

item.title: Why Trumpâs Historic Defense-Budget Request Matters
item.description: Now itâs time for Congress to do the difficult work.

item.title: âFBI Does It Tooâ: Media Hacks Go All Out To Downplay SPLC Indictment
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche summed up the case perfectly by saying, 'The SPLC is manufacturing racism to justify its existence.'

item.title: The Fight to Expose Left-Wing Violence
item.description: Starting today, NR donors who give $250 and up will receive a free, signed copy of my forthcoming book on the subject.

item.title: How Justice Alito Assembled The Coalition That Sent Roe To The Dustbin Of History
item.description: Alito was seen as the 'best person for the job' because 'one of his greatest strengths is keeping a majority opinion together,' writes Hemingway.

item.title: Fraud Is Costing Taxpayers Up To Half A Trillion Dollars A Year, And Weâre Not Doing Enough To Stop It
item.description: The Trump administration has taken a series of significant steps against fraud, but so far they're mostly going it alone.

item.title: Rep. David Scott dies suddenly just weeks before primary election in bid for 13th term
item.description: Rep. David Scott has died after representing his Georgia district for more than two decades. He was 80 years old.

item.title: Alito Knows âThis Is A Warâ For America And Wants His Clerks To Know It Too
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito is open-eyed about the ongoing âwarâ for the future of the United States â and he wants his law clerks to do their ...

item.title: Trump announces Iranian female protesters won't be executed
item.description: President Trump announced on social media Wednesday that the eight Iranian women scheduled to be executed by the regime now won't be.

item.title: SPLC Indicted for Gain-of-Function Research into Racism
item.description: The scurrilous left-wing group had to pay for racism to meet demand. But the criminal case may not stick.

item.title: New Records Prove Biden FBI Spying On Congress âWasnât An Isolated Incidentâ
item.description: If the Biden administration was defined by one thing, it was its consistent and careful targeting of Democratsâ political enemies.

item.title: Pulp Friction Between the Military and the Movies
item.description: How Secretary Hegseth strategized the war of cultural ownership.

item.title: Supreme Court ponders deporting green card holders
item.description: The Trump administration asked the Supreme Court on Wednesday to make it easier to deport green card holders with criminal records who leave the count...

item.title: Virginia Votes Against Its Citizens While National Republicans Sleep
item.description: Virginia barely passed a partisan redistricting that will be hard to undo.

item.title: Got drumsticks? Bill would allow SNAP participants to buy hot rotisserie chicken
item.description: The Hot Rotisserie Chicken Act aims to kill two birds with one stone: affordability and nutrition.
